nodes.label: Map Experience
nodes.healthReason: GraphCanvas and runtime hooks still concentrate a lot of scene logic

nodes.summary: Shared constants, tokens, and type contracts

nodes.summary: CLI runtime that builds and drives maps

nodes.label: Command Surface
nodes.healthReason: show.js has become a wide control surface for the live map

nodes.label: Map Model
nodes.healthReason: Multi-map scope resolution and manifest state now live in one bounded model layer

nodes.label: Graph Synthesis
nodes.healthReason: Enrichment still combines override parsing, prioritization, and heuristic graphing

nodes.label: Runtime Transport
nodes.healthReason: mcp-client.js still owns transport, runtime state, and file-shim mutation paths

nodes.label: Command Harness
nodes.summary: CLI argument parsing and command execution

nodes.label: Delivery Pipeline
nodes.healthReason: Packaging and install behavior still depend on a few large operational scripts

nodes.label: Distribution
nodes.healthReason: Artifact creation and install flows are still driven by a few large scripts
